title: Market Index Model
description: JSON Schema for market index models (DR-172). Defines composite indexes built from weighted constituent tickers across exchanges.

indexType.description: Whether the index is system-defined or player-created

constituentTickers.description: Tickers that compose this index with their weights

tickerId.description: Reference to a ticker in a nation ticker set

exchangeId.description: Exchange on which the ticker is listed

weight.description: Proportional weight of this ticker in the index (0-1)

baseValue.description: Starting index value at game start

description.description: Human-readable description of the index purpose
